title: RealFantasy
description: Fabric 1.20.1 | ⚜️Best medieval fantasy modpack with new bosses, weapons, armor and adventure⚜️
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d07a1071822f5182a78bdf69d1bc1d0eb9aa51e5.png)
This is a Minecraft Modpack called RealFantasy. The creator of this modpack is - JustWitaj.
Modpack consists of 139 mods. In this world you can find new structures, new mobs, skill tree, quests and much more.

# Beginning of the game

The game starts as usual. You appear in the village and begin to extract initial resources. Since you appeared in the village, you have the opportunity to trade with the villagers. Villagers buy and sell things not for emeralds, as usual, but for currency, as is done in Terraria. You can get this currency through trade or find it in dungeons and structures.

Next, you make the first tools as usual. They can be wooden, or they can be made of other materials if you are lucky and find them in the village. After which we make armor, weapons, depending on what class you have chosen, and go look for adventures.

# Classes

The main classes are Warrior, Archer and Wizard. There are also many subclasses.

Warrior is a class with average damage and good defense. Main weapons and armor for a warrior from the mod Minecraft Dungeons:Weapon. Divided into classes of swordsman, axeman, palladin, rogue, spearman and others.

Archer is a class with good damage and weak defense. Divided into archer and crossbowman subclasses.

The Wizard is a class with average damage and average defense. Divided into subclasses of frost mage, fire mage, arcana mage and priest.
